summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that MSFT is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $398.73. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 21.4%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $428.58 and a significant trendline confluence around $425.48 (formed by 14 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
